selected_issues.proposed_change: Replace the mid-page support image with a bolder credibility visual that pushes attention deeper into the offer narrative.
Push the CTA color system toward a higher-contrast accent palette to test whether visual urgency alone can lift clicks.
Tighten the supporting subhead to make the hero promise feel more specific without changing the promoted headline structure.

reasoning: Week 2's gains opened room to intentionally push harder on visual and styling changes, even if that increased the risk of overshooting the bounce-rate guardrail.
monitor_signal: Monitor confidence rose after two promoted weeks, so the planner widened scope into higher-variance asset and CSS experiments.
